---
title: "`r if (exists('reportTitle')) reportTitle else 'ScMultiOmics Report'`"
output:
  html_document:
    mathjax: https://fgcz-gstore.uzh.ch/reference/mathjax.js
    self_contained: true
    includes:
      in_header: !expr system.file("templates/fgcz_header.html", package="ezRun")
    css: !expr system.file("templates/fgcz.css", package="ezRun")
    code_folding: hide
params:
  gstore_data_path: null
  explore_url: null
editor_options:
  chunk_output_type: inline
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE, comment = "")
library(ezRun)
library(Seurat)
library(ggplot2)
library(qs2)
library(knitr)

`%||%` <- function(a, b) if (!is.null(a)) a else b

param        <- ezLoadRobj("param")
modalities   <- ezLoadRobj("modalities")
scMultiData  <- ezLoadRobj("scMultiData",
                           nthreads = max(1L, param$cores %||% 4L))
output       <- tryCatch(ezLoadRobj("output"), error = function(e) NULL)

# Pick best embedding for the RNA "primary" UMAP and a cell-type column.
rna_umap <- if ("umap" %in% names(scMultiData@reductions)) "umap" else
            if ("tsne" %in% names(scMultiData@reductions)) "tsne" else
            names(scMultiData@reductions)[1]
celltype_col <- ezRun::pickCellTypeColumn(scMultiData)
# Prefer WNN clusters when WNN ran; fall back to RNA seurat_clusters.
wnn_col <- scMultiData@misc$wnn_cluster_col
cluster_col <- if (!is.null(wnn_col) && wnn_col %in% colnames(scMultiData@meta.data)) {
  wnn_col
} else if ("seurat_clusters" %in% colnames(scMultiData@meta.data)) {
  "seurat_clusters"
} else NULL
sample_name <- if ("Sample" %in% colnames(scMultiData@meta.data)) {
  unique(scMultiData$Sample)[1]
} else "sample"

# Canonical cluster palette + numeric ordering, shared across all child tabs
# so DimPlots / DotPlots / scRepertoire bar plots use consistent colors and
# numeric x-axis order (0, 1, 2, ..., 10, 11) instead of character-sort.
cluster_levels <- if (!is.null(cluster_col) &&
                      !is.null(scMultiData@meta.data[[cluster_col]])) {
  lvls <- levels(as.factor(scMultiData@meta.data[[cluster_col]]))
  num  <- suppressWarnings(as.integer(lvls))
  if (all(!is.na(num))) as.character(sort(num)) else lvls
} else NULL
cluster_pal <- if (!is.null(cluster_levels)) {
  setNames(unname(pals::polychrome())[seq_along(cluster_levels)], cluster_levels)
} else unname(pals::polychrome())
# Force the cluster column to the numeric-sorted factor so every chunk
# (including scRepertoire functions that read group.by directly) sees the
# right order.
if (!is.null(cluster_col) && !is.null(cluster_levels) &&
    is.factor(scMultiData@meta.data[[cluster_col]])) {
  scMultiData@meta.data[[cluster_col]] <- factor(
    as.character(scMultiData@meta.data[[cluster_col]]),
    levels = cluster_levels)
}

# Build exploreSC URL once so child Rmds don't have to re-discover the path.
# Precedence:
#   1. params$explore_url       — caller passes a literal URL.
#   2. params$gstore_data_path  — caller passes a gstore-relative dir
#                                 ("pXXXXX/.../<report_dir>"); we append the
#                                 file name.
#   3. cwd heuristic            — strip everything up to the project segment
#                                 from getwd() and keep the FULL remainder.
#                                 Replaces the previous basename()-based logic
#                                 that dropped intermediate dirs (e.g.
#                                 Analyses_Paul/<run>/) and 404'd in exploreSC.
explore_url <- NULL
if (!is.null(params$explore_url) && nzchar(params$explore_url)) {
  explore_url <- params$explore_url
} else if (!is.null(params$gstore_data_path) && nzchar(params$gstore_data_path)) {
  explore_url <- paste0("https://fgcz-shiny.uzh.ch/app/exploreSC/?data=",
                        sub("/+$", "", params$gstore_data_path),
                        "/scMultiData.qs2")
} else {
  m <- regmatches(getwd(), regexec("/(p\\d+)/(.+)$", getwd()))[[1]]
  if (length(m) == 3 && nzchar(m[2]) && nzchar(m[3])) {
    explore_url <- paste0("https://fgcz-shiny.uzh.ch/app/exploreSC/?data=",
                          m[2], "/", m[3], "/scMultiData.qs2")
  }
}
```

# {.tabset}

```{r rna-child, child = system.file("templates/_scMultiOmics_rna.Rmd", package = "ezRun")}
```

```{r adt-child, eval = isTRUE(modalities$hasADT), child = system.file("templates/_scMultiOmics_adt.Rmd", package = "ezRun")}
```

```{r atac-child, eval = isTRUE(modalities$hasATAC), child = system.file("templates/_scMultiOmics_atac.Rmd", package = "ezRun")}
```

```{r wnn-child, eval = isTRUE(modalities$ranWNN), child = system.file("templates/_scMultiOmics_wnn.Rmd", package = "ezRun")}
```

```{r vdj-child, eval = isTRUE(modalities$hasVDJ_T) || isTRUE(modalities$hasVDJ_B), child = system.file("templates/_scMultiOmics_vdj.Rmd", package = "ezRun")}
```

```{r explore-child, child = system.file("templates/_scMultiOmics_explore.Rmd", package = "ezRun")}
```

```{r notes-child, child = system.file("templates/_scMultiOmics_notes.Rmd", package = "ezRun")}
```

## Session Information

```{r session-info}
sessionInfo()
```
